Name: 8x4.5 Inch RC Drone Propellers
Purpose: These will be used on the brushless motors to provide lift for the drone. I am buying 8 pieces instead of 4 in case some breaks during testing.

Name: Zeee 3S 5200mAh 50C Li-po battery
Purpose: This will be used to power the drone in its flight time.

Name: 3S Li-po Battery Charger
Purpose: This will be used to charge the battery for the drone.

Name: FLYSKY FS-i6 6Channel 2.4GHz AFHDS2A RC Transmitter & Reciever
Purpose: This will be used for the radio communication with the drone.

Name: 30A Brushless Motor ESC
Purpose: This will be the Electronic Speec Controller for the 4 brushless motors on the drone. Please buy 2 pieces for a total of 4 for each motor.

Name: WWZMDiB SG90 Micro Servo Motor
Purpose: The servo motor will be used to grab and drop the medication package.

Name: 4 PCS QWinOut A2212 1400KV Brushless Motors
Purpose: These will be the motors that generate lift for the drone. While buying, please choose the 4PCS option on Amazon.
